title: Buyer views a partially-received PO and short-closes the rest
user_persona: Buyer cleaning up old open POs at end of quarter

conversation.user: Show me open POs older than 90 days with partial receipt.

bot_must: fire POVWENTTRN1 with filter (status=Open, age>90d, partially_received=true)
return list of matching POs with PO number, supplier, value, % received
show PO-2026-101 detail with per-line ordered/received quantities

conversation.user: Line 2 has 30 of 50 received. Short-close the remaining 20.

expected_terminal_state.po_status: Open or Closed depending on other lines

evaluation_metrics.filtered_view_supported: PoViw must support filter parameters (status, age, partial_receipt)
evaluation_metrics.journey_switch: PoViw → PoScl with PO context carried
